titles.en: Chapter on the Executor Purchasing From the deceased's Estate When it is Sold to the Highest Bidder
Chapter on the Executor Purchasing From the deceased's Estate When it is Sold to the Highest Bidder

segments: : كَتَبْتُ مَعَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى هَلْ لِلْوَصِيِّ أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ شَيْئاً مِنْ مَالِ اَلْمَيِّتِ إِذَا بِيعَ فِيمَنْ زَادَ يَزِيدُ وَ يَأْخُذُ لِنَفْسِهِ فَقَالَ "يَجُوزُ إِذَا اِشْتَرَى صَحِيحاً".
arabic.text: : كَتَبْتُ مَعَ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَحْيَى هَلْ لِلْوَصِيِّ أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ شَيْئاً مِنْ مَالِ اَلْمَيِّتِ إِذَا بِيعَ فِيمَنْ زَادَ يَزِيدُ وَ يَأْخُذُ لِنَفْسِهِ فَقَالَ "يَجُوزُ إِذَا اِشْتَرَى صَحِيحاً".

segments:
Hadith.5514 - Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Yahya narrated from Al-Husayn ibn Ibrahim Al-Hamdani, who said: I wrote along with Muhammad ibn Yahya asking whether the executor of a will is permitted to purchase something from the deceased's estate when it is sold to the highest bidder and take it for himself.
Imam (as) replied: "It is permissible if he purchases it properly."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5514 - Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Yahya narrated from Al-Husayn ibn Ibrahim Al-Hamdani, who said: I wrote along with Muhammad ibn Yahya asking whether the executor of a will is permitted to purchase something from the deceased's estate when it is sold to the highest bidder and take it for himself.
Imam (as) replied: "It is permissible if he purchases it properly."

narratorChain.raw: 5514 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنِ اَلْحُسَيْنِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ اَلْهَمْدَانِيِّ قَالَ
